nextSteps.title: After Your Surgery: Recovery Guidelines
nextSteps.intro: Please follow these instructions carefully to ensure a smooth and safe recovery. Our team is here to support you.

steps.title: 1. Rest & Activity
steps.description: Rest for the first 24–48 hours. Avoid heavy lifting or strenuous exercise for at least one week. Short, gentle walks are encouraged.

steps.title: 2. Medications
steps.description: Take all prescribed medications exactly as directed. Do not stop antibiotics early. Contact our pharmacy if you experience side effects.

steps.title: 3. Wound Care
steps.description: Keep the surgical site clean and dry. Change dressings daily or as instructed. Watch for signs of infection: redness, swelling, or discharge.

steps.title: 4. Follow‑Up Appointment
steps.description: A nurse will call within 48 hours to schedule your follow‑up visit. Please bring your discharge summary to the appointment.

steps.title: 5. Diet & Hydration
steps.description: Start with clear liquids, then advance to bland foods. Drink plenty of water. Avoid alcohol and spicy foods for 3–5 days.

steps.title: 6. When to Call Us
steps.description: Seek immediate help if you have fever above 38°C, severe pain not relieved by medication, heavy bleeding, or difficulty breathing.
